narrative:
Cass Twp township has 690 registered voters, with 44.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 47.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.6 percentage points.
